name: Spicy Vegetable Soup with Black Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup red wine or stock or water
2 tsp finely minced fresh ginger (don't omit)
15 oz can black beans, with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic in wine until the onion is soft.
2. Add the crushed tomatoes, water or stock, green bell pepper, celery, okra, ginger, and seasonings. Simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Stir in the diced zucchini and black beans with their liquid. Cover and cook until the zucchini is just tender, about 10 minutes.
4. Taste and adjust the seasoning with soy sauce if desired.
5. Serve over cooked brown rice.
